{{Quote|The rest of us Gamorreans speak in complete sentences! Why can't you?|translated=1|Rogua, criticizing [[Gartogg/Legends|Gartogg]]|<ref name="AndThen">{{StoryCite|story=And Then There Were Some: The Gamorrean Guard's Tale|book=Tales from Jabba's Palace}}</ref>}}
'''Rogua''' was one of [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure's]] nine [[Gamorrean/Legends|Gamorrean]] guards. He took unusual joy in making [[Gartogg/Legends|Gartogg]] miserable.<ref name="AndThen" /> He was a member of the [[Groogrun]] clan.<ref name="EGWT" />

==Biography==
[[File:OrtuggRoguaChoked-ROTJ.png|thumb|left|250px|Rogua (left) and Ortugg (right) block Luke Skywalker's path.]]
Amongst his duties included guarding the main door (with his partner [[Ortugg]]) and escorting prisoners to the cells.<ref name="GG5">''[[Galaxy Guide 5: Return of the Jedi]]''</ref> He was guarding the main door with Ortugg during the arrival of [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] and [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]].<ref name="BTM">''[[Star Wars: Behind the Magic]]''</ref> When [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]], disguised as [[Boushh/Legends|Boushh]], entered the palace with [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]], Ortugg and Rogua escorted the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] to prison. Gartogg followed them, wanting to help, but Ortugg and Rogua sent him away. However, the disappointed Gartogg still followed them.<ref name="AndThen" />

When Jabba tried to negotiate with Boushh, Gartogg tried to ask Ortugg and Rogua if he was allowed to go on [[Khetanna/Legends|Jabba's sail barge]], but Ortugg said Gartogg must earn the privilege, while Rogua made fun of him for not being able to speak in complete sentences. When Gartogg came to Rogua and Ortugg after discovering [[Phlegmin]]'s corpse and planned to solve the murder, Ortugg said he would allow Gartogg to come on the [[Sail barge/Legends|sail barge]] if the mystery was solved.<ref name="AndThen" />

[[File:Rogua-SWI143.jpg|thumb|right|250px|Rogua]]
Later, when [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] arrived at the palace, Rogua and Ortugg attempted to block Luke's way, but were both [[Telekinesis/Legends#Choking powers|Force choked]] by the [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] and lost consciousness.<ref name="CCG Choke">{{CCG|set=Jabba's Palace Limited|cardname=Choke}}</ref> Rogua was one of the Gamorreans who went on the sail barge during the [[Battle of the Great Pit of Carkoon]] with Ortugg,<ref name="AndThen" /> who was known to have been killed in the explosion of the barge.<ref name="TCSWE">''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref>
